provenance.authority: IGN Geoplateforme WFS AOC-VITICOLES:aire_parcellaire (INAO delimited AOC parcels), Licence Ouverte Etalab
provenance.membership_source: data/wine-map/inao-denomination-membership.json (exact member names + parcel counts, pinned in-repo)
provenance.method: GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE - server-side denom LIKE bound, client-side exact membership match, client-side concave dissolve (same engine as the live pipeline).
caveats: member names are the exact INAO legal denominations (kept verbatim so membership matching is exact); display names drop the 'ou ...' variants: 'Cote Rotie' -> Cote-Rotie, 'Hermitage ou Ermitage ou l'Hermitage ou l'Ermitage' -> Hermitage, 'Crozes-Hermitage ou Crozes-Ermitage' -> Crozes-Hermitage.
Saint-Joseph is a long discontinuous strip down the west bank (984 parcels) - expect several components, which is correct.
Chateau-Grillet (6 parcels) is a tiny monopole; Hermitage (16 parcels) is the single delimited hill - both dissolve to small footprints.

DEFERRED follow-ups: the france.rhone REGION outline (dissolve of 'Cotes du Rhone', ~18,181 parcels - a heavy fetch) and the Southern Rhone crus (Chateauneuf-du-Pape, Gigondas, Vacqueyras, Tavel, Lirac...).

modeling_decision: These 8 are the Northern Rhone communal crus: is_appellation=true, appellation_level=village, appellation_system=AOC, classification=GENERALIZED_FROM_OFFICIAL_SOURCE, primary_parent=france.rhone, tier 2. The region place france.rhone (display 'Vallee du Rhone', tier 1) is built later from the 'Cotes du Rhone' dissolve; an optional france.rhone.septentrionale / .meridionale district split can group N vs S at build time (owner call). Grapes: Syrah (all reds), Viognier (Condrieu, Chateau-Grillet), Marsanne/Roussanne (Hermitage/Crozes/Saint-Joseph/Saint-Peray whites). Scoring links: exact-name against live reference rows (never fuzzy); appellations without an exact scoring row stay PENDING. NOT run live - reviewable groundwork; the catalog/boundary/flip/links/content build waits on the owner shape-review gate.

targets.name: Hermitage
members: Hermitage ou Ermitage ou l'Hermitage ou l'Ermitage
